facts: The 2025 Stack Overflow survey reports substantial AI trust and debugging friction among its respondents.
GitHub status checks and agent-session logs expose only parts of the completion-evidence workflow.
Current products already address agent action records and receipts.
hypotheses: Developers will value a lightweight manual receipt builder across agents.
A browser-only local workflow will be easier than reviewing raw logs.
Portable Markdown and JSON receipts will fit existing review habits.
decisions: Pursue a narrow local MVP named PatchProof.
Do not pursue Repo Contract Doctor, ExampleLens, or RunnerGap in this chain.
The first product must not execute unknown code, upload repositories, or claim semantic correctness.
constraints: Local-only work unless a later external action is separately approved.
Preserve passed, failed, skipped, unknown, and unsupported evidence states.
Do not present the discovery decision as customer validation or product-market fit.

checks: selected and rejected opportunities are preserved
source evidence and limitations are preserved
unresolved assumptions remain classified as unknowns
fresh reviewer passed the source and handoff boundary

authorization.approvedScope: reviewed repo-local skill installation and local product work only
